plugins.name: filesystem
plugins.description: Give Claude sandboxed read/write access to directories on your local filesystem

plugins.name: postgres
plugins.description: Let Claude inspect schemas and run read-only SQL queries against a PostgreSQL database

plugins.name: marketplace
plugins.description: MCP server that lets Claude browse and search marketplace plugins as tools

plugins.name: accessibility-check
plugins.description: Check UI output for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance using axe-core plus required manual checks

plugins.name: adr-template
plugins.description: Record architecture decisions in a consistent ADR format with context, options, consequences, and compliance notes

plugins.name: bdd-workflow
plugins.description: Derive testable Given/When/Then acceptance criteria and convert them to Cucumber/Gherkin feature files

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Structured code review of the current branch — security, correctness, performance, and readability

plugins.name: conventional-commit
plugins.description: Generate a Conventional Commits-compliant git commit message from staged changes

plugins.name: explain-codebase
plugins.description: Generate a layered onboarding explanation of the current codebase for new developers

plugins.name: marketplace-skill
plugins.description: Browse and install marketplace plugins conversationally from within Claude Code

plugins.name: openspec
plugins.description: OpenSpec workflow skills — explore ideas, propose changes, apply tasks, archive completed changes. Requires the openspec CLI.

plugins.name: review-checklist
plugins.description: Structured pass/fail checklist for code review: correctness, tests, security, quality, dependencies, docs

plugins.name: notify-on-stop
plugins.description: Send a desktop notification (macOS / Linux) when Claude finishes a task

plugins.name: audit-log
plugins.description: Append a JSON audit trail of every tool Claude calls to ~/.claude/audit.log

plugins.name: python-project
plugins.description: CLAUDE.md template for Python projects using uv, pytest, ruff, and mypy

plugins.name: nodejs-project
plugins.description: CLAUDE.md template for Node.js/TypeScript projects using Vitest, ESLint, and Prettier
